Ascend C conv_standard_2d_square_input_square_kernel kernel implementation
API: Conv2D Convolution
AscendC conv2d kernel example for NCHW float32 with stride=1, padding=0, dilation=1, groups=1, 3x3 kernel and large square images

Ascend C conv_standard_2d_square_input_square_kernel kernel implementation
API: Conv2D Convolution
AscendC custom op example for 2D convolution (conv2d) NCHW float32 with 3x3 kernel, stride 1, no padding, including tiling strategy, AICore kernel code, and host operator/tiling registration.
